name: raycast-todo
title: Todo
description: A local markdown-backed todo list for Raycast. Add, toggle, and annotate tasks with notes, all stored in a single configurable markdown file.
author: vishalkg

commands.name: todo
commands.title: Todo
commands.description: View, add, edit, and toggle todos

preferences.name: todoFilePath
preferences.title: Todo File Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the markdown file that stores your todos. Supports ~ for home directory. If the file does not exist, it will be created.
